title: The Unbreakable Promise
tagline: A typed vow signed in your browser so anyone can verify exactly who promised exactly what.
holy_shit: You can publish one line and a signature, and any stranger can prove your browser key made that exact promise — with no server and no trust in a host.
powered_by: Pinned verify-before-exec runtime plus browser-native WebCrypto ECDSA P-256 sign/verify
agent_scenario: When you need: a tamper-evident personal commitment that anyone can re-verify offline from shared text + key + signature.
author: kody-w + Copilot
